articles.title: A warning sign about AI’s real cost, courtesy of Google and Amazon
articles.description: AI has made it a lot harder for tech companies like Amazon and Google to deliver on their net-zero pledges.
articles.summary: Google's AI systems demand so much energy that the carbon footprint of training them is comparable to a small country. Amazon has reportedly used electricity equivalent to over one million homes for its AI efforts in just five months, highlighting significant environmental costs associated with machine learning.
points: - Google's use of renewable energy and carbon offsets does not fully mitigate the massive carbon footprint from training their GPT models.

- Amazon uses more electricity for AI in a five-month period than some countries produce annually, according to leaked documents that revealed internal cost concerns over using such technologies responsibly.

- The revelation of these environmental costs associated with machine learning and large language models could lead to increased scrutiny and demands for more sustainable AI practices in the industry.
articles.insight: The article underscores a growing concern within the tech community regarding the substantial energy requirements and consequent carbon emissions of training advanced machine learning systems. This issue might prompt companies to seek greener alternatives or rethink their approach towards sustainable AI development.

articles.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
articles.description: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.
articles.summary: Meta introduced a new social platform called 'Pocket,' where users can create and interact with vibe-coded mini video games through AI technology by inputting text.
points: Meta quietly launches Pocket, an experimental gaming app using AI to generate interactive videos from text prompts
The platform focuses on creating immersive user experiences without the need for extensive programming knowledge or skills in video game development
Pocket uses 'vibe coding' language that combines visual cues and emotional responses with voice-over narrations to guide users through personalized gaming scenarios
articles.insight: This launch signals a shift towards more user-friendly, AI-driven entertainment experiences within the metaverse. As Pocket removes traditional barriers like programming knowledge and skills in video game development, it may democratize content creation for users across different skill levels.

articles.title: Travel app Hopper to pay $35M in FTC settlement over ‘unfairly’ charging hidden fees
articles.description: Hopper will pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that it used deceptive “dark patterns” to hide fees and mislead travelers about the cost and benefits of services.
articles.summary: Hopper will pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that it used deceptive “dark patterns” to hide fees and mislead travelers about the cost and benefits of services
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
articles.description: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.
articles.summary: Anthropic is developing a new custom AI chip to be used alongside Samsung'tablet hardware.
points: A week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip, Anthropic has entered negotiations with leading semiconductor company Samsung to discuss the development of their own specialized chips for artificial intelligence applications in tablets and other devices.

The new processors are anticipated to be optimized specifically for handling complex language tasks such as text generation while being energy efficient, which is a primary challenge that Anthropic has previously faced with its current hardware.
Anthropic claims the collaboration will accelerate their ability to deploy AI technologies in consumer devices and bring forward significant improvements.
articles.insight: The development of specialized chips by companies like Anthropi is poised to revolutionize mobile computing, providing powerful capabilities while conserving energy. It could lead to more widespread adoption of AI technologies in daily life and enhance user experiences.

articles.title: Boeing-owned Wisk Aero accused of firing manager who raised safety concerns
articles.description: A former software manager claims Wisk rushed software testing ahead of a crucial 2025 flight test.
articles.summary: Wisk Aero is accused by a former employee of hurrying the process of developing and approving its autonomous air vehicle software ahead of critical tests in late 2decade-old.
points: Former Wisk manager alleges rushed development timeline
Crucial flight test set for early next decade without proper safety checks
Accusations by former employee lead to internal investigation
articles.insight: This news raises concerns about the IT/technology industry's commitment to ensuring thorough testing and validation before deployment, highlighting potential risks of rushed timelines for autonomous technologies.

articles.title: Melinda Gates’ venture firm backs Magnify Ventures’ $46.6M Fund II
articles.description: Early-stage firm Magnify Ventures has raised a $46.6 million Fund II from LPs, including Melinda French Gates’ Pivotal Ventures.
articles.summary: Melinda French Gates' investment firm backed early-stage venture capital fund Magnify Ventures with a $46.xx million in its Fund II round led by Pivotal Ventures.
points: Pivotal Ventures, founded and managed by Melinda French Gates (affiliated with Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation), leads the investment into Magnify Ventures' $46.6 million second funding round.
Early-stage venture capital firm Magnify Ventures raises significant Series B financing, indicating strong market confidence and potential for growth in its portfolio companies.
The news highlights Melinda French Gates’ influence within the startup ecosystem by positioning Pivotal as a key investor.
articles.insight: This fundraising success of Magnify Ventures, backed notably by technology titan Melinda French Gates through her venture firm, illustrates an increasing trend among high-profile philanthropists to directly engage with the startup ecosystem for impactful investments.

articles.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
articles.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.
articles.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has suggested donating a portion of his company's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund as part of the broader discussion on how AI financial successes should benefit society.
points: CEO of OpenAI, Sam Altman proposes sharing in profits with public through donation
The proposed equity percentage is about 5% for a U.S. sovereign wealth fund
This proposal reignites conversations on the financial distribution from AI developments
articles.insight: Altman's proposition could set precedent in corporate social responsibility within tech, potentially influencing how future profits are allocated towards public good.

articles.title: Popular TV-tracking app TV Time is shutting down as company focuses on AI
articles.description: TV Time, the popular TV-tracking app, is shutting down on July 15 as parent company Whip Media pivots toward enterprise AI products.
articles.summary: Popular TV tracking app TV Time will cease operations to allow its parent company to shift focus towards artificial intelligence enterprise solutions.
points: TV Time is shutting down as Whip Media pivots toward AI development
The closure occurs on July 15, with the move reflecting a strategic industry trend in technology diversification and specialization
Whip Media' extramural business activities are expected to generate revenue for their core television-focused products
articles.insight: The news signifies an important shift within Whip Media towards AI, a growing sector that complements traditional media in providing value through data analytics and personalized content delivery.

articles.title: Lucid Motors’ CFO is out as its new CEO continues leadership shakeup
articles.description: The company announced a new slate of executive hires meant to help turn things around, as Gravity SUV sales are not taking off as expected.
articles.summary: The company announced a new slate of executive hires meant to help turn things around, as Gravity SUV sales are not taking off as expected
points: The company announced a new slate of executive hires meant to help turn things around, as Gravity SU...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: US government says it got hacked — again
articles.description: A top Democrat on the Senate's Intelligence Committee warned that the information accessed on a Homeland Security intelligence-sharing network may risk national security.
articles.summary: Democrats are concerned about potential risks to national security after repeated hacks into US government networks.
points: A top Democrat on the Senate's Intelligence Committee warned that hacked information may threaten national security.

The Homeland Security intelligence-sharing network has been repeatedly breached by cyber actors believed to be foreign state sponsored. As of late September, 32 separate intrusions have already occurred this year alone.
Experts fear a 'sophisticated attacker is operating in our environment with money and political motives.'
articles.insight: The repeated hacks on government networks highlight the growing threat of cyber espionage, indicating that foreign actors are increasingly attempting to gain intelligence for financial or political advantage.

articles.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
articles.description: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.
articles.summary: Microsoft has announced the launch of an in-house artificial intelligence (AI) deployment company as part of a $2.5 billion commitment to compete with industry leaders like Amazon and OpenAI.
points: Microsoft's investment will drive innovation within its AI services division, potentially reshaping how other tech firms approach similar projects.
The creation of Microsoft'in-house team signifies the company's belief in having direct control over their artificial intelligence offerings rather than outsourcing them to third parties.
This move could influence a broader industry shift towards establishing dedicated AI units within tech corporations, altering competition dynamics.
articles.insight: Microsoft's formation of its own AI deployment group indicates the company is serious about making significant contributions and maintaining competitiveness in artificial intelligence. This initiative could encourage more firms to invest similarly in their dedicated AI divisions.

articles.title: Tesla saw a massive sales jump in the second quarter
articles.description: The company delivered more than 480,000 EVs globally, seemingly thanks to geographic expansion and cheaper versions of the Model 3, Model Y, and Cybertruck.
articles.summary: Tesla delivered over half a million electric vehicles globally in Q2 thanks to geographic expansion and more affordable models.
points: Delivery of EVs by Tesla increased significantly, with the company surpassing delivery targets for six consecutive months starting from February-March quarter. This record sets a precedent within an industry that has long faced challenges in achieving such numbers consistently.

Tesla's success is attributed to its geographic expansion and introduction of more affordable versions of Model 3, Model Y, and Cybertruck; this represents the company’s ability to adapt their business model effectively within a competitive marketplace. This shift in strategy could potentially reshape industry expectations for future electric vehicle manufacturers.

The article suggests that Tesla is on an upward trajectory with increasing sales, indicating strong demand and consumer acceptance of EVs; this trend may be indicative of a broader societal move towards sustainable transportation options.
articles.insight: Tesla's significant increase in electric vehicle deliveries could signal the growing normalization of EV ownership, potentially leading to increased investment and innovation within the IT/technology industry as companies strive to keep up with evolving consumer expectations and demands.

articles.title: Rivian raises EV sales forecast as Q2 production ramps up
articles.description: The company now expects to ship a few thousand more vehicles by the end of 2026 than it previously expected, after launching its R2 SUV last month.
articles.summary: Rivian has increased its electric vehicle (EV) sales forecast following the recent ramp-up in Q2 production and subsequent release of the new R2 SUV model.
points: Launched a high anticipation product: The Rivian Electric Semi is set to roll out this fall, creating buzz within EV markets
Increased annual sales forecast for next year due to successful production scaling and increased consumer interest in its new SUV model (the R2)
Expanding partnerships with retailers: Rivian plans to expand its dealership presence across the United States, targeting more accessibility
articles.insight: Rivian'thy optimism about future sales indicates strong market position and growing popularity in the EV industry. The launch of R2 SUV could also suggest a shift towards consumer demand for versatile electric vehicles.

articles.title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
articles.description: Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.
articles.summary: Ben Guez uses the open-source social network site OpenClaw for dating purposes by leveraging a script that connects with potential international wives on Instagram. His method involves using Claude code and automated messaging, raising questions about privacy and consent.
points: Ben utilizes an 'Insta-Dater' tool developed by OpenClaw to find potential overseas partners through social media interactions with international women he meets on Instagram.
The script allows for the automated sending of personalized messages, which are crafted using Claude code that enables translation into different languages such as French and Spanish.
articles.insight: While innovative in connecting people across borders through technology, Ben Guez' end-to-end dating process with potential international partners raises significant privacy concerns. Furthermore, his approach is at odds with ethical standards of consent commonly upheld within the IT/technology industry.

articles.title: 오리엔텀, 호주 국가 양자 방문단과 맞손... “공동 연구·글로벌 상용화 가속”
articles.description: 2일 ‘퀀텀코리아 2026 개최... 호주 양자산업 비즈니스 미션 방문단 오리엔텀 방문[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 오리엔텀이 2일 열린 ‘퀀텀코리아 2026’을 맞아 한국을 찾은 호주 양자 분야 전문가들과 양자 기술 공동 연구 및 상용화를 위한 협력 방안을 모색했다. 오리엔텀은 호주 양자 기술 관련 국가 기관과 주요 대학, 딥테크 기업들로 구성된 ‘호주 양자산
articles.summary: 오리엔텀이 한국을 결정몰에서 호주 양자 기술 연구 그룹을 찾아내였다.
points: - 오리엔텀이 퀀텀코리아 2026에서 '호주 양자산업 미션'를 말할 것이다.
- '공동 연구·글로벌 상용화 가속'을 위한 협력방안을 모쳤다.
- 국가 기관과 주요 대학, 딥테이지 기술 회사로 구성된 '호주 양자산 연구관'을 만났다.
articles.insight:
이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서 한국이 퀀텀코리아 2026의 중요한 인재로 받을 가능성을 강조하고, '호주 양자산 연구관'이 공동 연구와 상용화에 필요한 협력방안을 제공해내며 기술의 피 Latex 이기줄로커서를 통하여 브라우쿨에 있어요. 
	국가의 인재를 IT/기술 업계에 대체하여, 이런 협력방안은 기술이 이용으로 정의되는 한국을 위한 근선이 될 수 01를 보장해주면서요.

articles.title: “PQC-QKD 실제 적용”... 양자보안연구회 워크숍 10일 개최
articles.description: 국내외 PQC-QKD 최신 연구 개발 현황 및 발전 방향 논의[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 양자내성암호(PQC)와 양자키분배(QKD) 등 양자 보안 기술의 실증과 적용 단계 도약을 위한 전문가 논의의 장이 열린다. 한국정보보호학회 양자보안연구회는 10일 세종시 세종컨벤션센터에서 ‘양자 전환을 위한 실행’(Action to Quantum Transformatio
articles.summary: 보안회의가 PQC-QKD로부터 질산정을 통한 IT/양자보안 기능 시스템 구성과 관련된 제안였다.
points: - PQC-QKD로부터 전체 IT/양자보안 시스템을 구성하는 방법에 대한 이해를 추가한다.
- 이러한 기술들은 임의의 공급자로부터 보안데이 intermediate layer 구성을 통한 보안 시스템 구성에 영향을 미치고 있다.
- PQC-QKD 기능과 각종 IT/양자로부터의 공급자로서, 보안회의가 중요한 내용이다.
articles.insight: 양자보안 시스템을 구현하기 위해 PQC-QKD 기능과 IT 공급자로부터의 질산정은 중요한 요소이다.

articles.title: “앤트로픽 AI 에이전트 ‘클로드 데스크톱’ 악용 해킹 성공”
articles.description: 펜테라 레드팀 제보... AI 에이전트 악용 경각심앤트로픽 “보안 취약점 아닌 설계된 기능”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 보안 기업 연구원들이 앤트로픽의 PC용 AI 에이전트 ‘클로드 데스크톱’을 악용한 공격으로 권한을 탈취하는 시도에 성공했다고 1일(현지시간) 해외 매체가 보도했다. 이에 AI 에이전트를 악용한 심각한 공격이 현실화되고 있다는 우려가 커진다.

points: AI 에이전트 악용 경각심앤트로픽 “보안 취약점 아닌 설계된 기능”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 보안 기업 연구원들이 앤트로픽의 PC용 AI 에이전트 ‘클로드 데스크톱’을 악용한 공격으...
이에 AI 에이전트를 악용한 심각한 공격이 현실화되고 있다는 우려가 커진다

articles.title: 방사청, ‘조달기업 손해 없도록’ 품목등록 유효기간 제도 개선
articles.description: 품목등록 조기 갱신 시 기존 유효기간 보장조달원 등록정보 관리지침 개정 및 제도 개선조달기업 등록관리 편의성 및 행정 신뢰성 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 방위사업청(청장 이용철)은 민원 서비스 개선의 일환으로, 국내 조달원의 품목 등록을 조기에 갱신하더라도 기존 유효기간을 보장하도록 ‘조달원 등록정보 관리지침’을 개정해 7월 1일부터 시행한다.현재 방위사업
articles.summary: 국내 조달기업 등록을 조기에 갱신하여, 등장/소요시간이 명확해지며 '조달원 등례정보 관리지침'을 개정하여 보장의 신뢰성 행위 강화
points: 방위사업청은 등장전까지 보장조달원을 등례정보에 기록하더라도 등장전에도 갱신
개정된 '조달원 등례정보 관리지침'는 7월 1일부터 시행
등장/소요시간이 명확해지며, 보장의 신뢰성과 행정 안전성을 강화
articles.insight: 이 변경으로 시민들은 등장전이 결국적으로 명확해지지만, 보장의 신뢰성을 향상시키기 위해 개정한 '조달원 등례정보 관리지침'을 시행하며, 이로코드는 국내 조달기업에서의 안전성과 보장으로 중요한 인식을 전제로 가지고 있다.

articles.title: 2026 IT21 글로벌 컨퍼런스 개막... “AI가 일상에 스며드는” 시대 신뢰 가능한 AI 논의
articles.description: AI 산업, 정보보호, 디지털 전환 분야 산학연 전문가 한자리에AI 안전, AI 에이전트, 디지털 전환, 양자보안 등 미래 ICT 핵심 의제 집중 조명[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] “AI로 인해 일자리가 줄어드는 시대엔 AI 기본 자산에 대한 접근 여부가 개인과 소기업의 경제적 성패를 좌우할 것입니다.” (황종성 전 NIA 원장) “핵 미사일과 사이버 공격, 드
articles.summary: 기사는 IT/기술 시대의 영향을 AI로 간주하여, 이를 인해 일자리 불안정성과 경제적 침체에 대한 문제점을 강조합니다.
points: AI로 인해 일자리가 줄어들고 있는 현상
AI를 활용한 ICT 의주
AI에 대한 공격력이 확산되고 있음
articles.insight: AI는 IT/기술 업계에서 중요한 역할을 하지만, AI의 공격력과 인위염이 증가하면 개인와 소비자가 이전 일자리 및 경제적 상태에서의 신뢰를 어떻게 수정해야 할까요?

articles.title: 산불 진화 드론, 야간비행 길 열린다... 규제샌드박스 과제 선정
articles.description: 대형산불 대응 군집드론 실증 추진야간비행 및 사후비행 허가 검토[보안뉴슥 강초희 기자] 국무조정실(실장 윤창렬)은 2026년 상반기 기획형 규제샌드박스 2차 과제로 대형산불 초기 긴급 대응을 위한 군집드론 운용을 선정했다고 밝혔다. 기획형 규제샌드박스는 기존처럼 기업의 신청을 기다리는 방식이 아니라, 정보가 먼저 규제 특례·실증 과제를 제시하고 사업자를 모
articles.summary: 2026년 상반기 기획형 규제샌드박스 문제를 선정하여, 대형산불의 초기 긴급 대응에 관한 군집 드론 실증이 개척
points: 2026년 상반기 기획형 규제샌드박스에서 군집 드론 실증을 선정합니다.
대형산불 군집 대응을 위해 최초의 긴기근착 대응 규제샌드박스가 선정된다.
군집 드론 추천은 야간비행과 사후비행을 위한 대혁균태를 지원하기 위해서다.
articles.insight: 이러한 규제샌드박스는 IT/기술 업체의 군집 대응 강화를 도와줄 계획입니다.

articles.title: 해남군, AI 기반 CCTV 관제 고도화 나선다
articles.description: AI 기반 CCTV 관제지원 시스템 구축사업 선정공공안전 AI 학습용 영상정보 연계 및 데이터 구축침수·이상행동 대응 AI 서비스 기반 마련[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 전남 해남군은 행정안전부가 추진하는 ‘인공지능(AI) 기반 지방정부 CCTV 관제지원시스템 구축’ 사업의 영상정보 연계 지방정부로 선정됐다고 2일 밝혔다.이번 사업은 지방정부가 보유한
articles.summary: 해남군에서 구축할 AI 기반 CCTV 관제시스템을 선정.
points: 해남군의 구축 공급
AI 학습용 영상속 정보 연계
이상행동 대응
articles.insight: 해남군은 AI를 활용하여 공안운전에 적합한 CCTV 시스템을 구축하려고 한다.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 벨로크, AI 영상분석·안티드론 등 통합보안 솔루션 공개
articles.description: 방화벽 정책 통합관리 및 정보보안 규정관리 고도화정보보안·물리보안 통합 기술력 및 차세대 보안 전략 제시[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 최근 AI 기술의 확산으로 사이버 위협이 더욱 지능화되면서 산업 현장과 공공 인프라를 보호하기 위한 정보보안의 중요성은 그 어느 때보다 높아지고 있다. 여기에 드론과 같은 새로운 물리적 위협 수단 등장으로 기존 보안 체계가 미처
articles.summary: 보안 기술이 자연맞춤으로 성장하면서 산업에서의 위협으로부터 더욱한 규제와 대비가 필요해진다.
points: ISEC 2026 미리보기에서 AI 영상분석·안티드론 중 pivot한 보안 시스템을 공개하고 빌어진다.
산업과 공무원들은 보안 기술의 계적화와 상세한 사용방식을 이해하고 있어야 할 뿐이다.
보안에 대한 시스템화체과 전략은 AI를 활동하기 위해서는 커다리와 지원컨진의 일정적인 규제와 대비를 통해 만들어야 한다.
articles.insight: 보안 기술의 발전과 산업체, 공무원들이 이를 인식하는 것이 중요한 역할을 해칠 것이다.

articles.title: “AI 통제, 문서 출처 추적부터”... 소프트캠프, AI 시대 등급 분류 전략 제시

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 비트디펜더, ISEC 2026서 차세대 AI 보안 플랫폼 ‘GravityZone’ 소개
articles.description: AI 기반 XDR·EDR 통합 보안 플랫폼 공개엔드포인트·클라우드·네트워크 통합 위협 탐지 및 대응AI 기반 인시던트 분석 및 공격 표면 관리 기능 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 비트디펜더(Bitdefender)는 전 세계 사이버 보안 기술의 38% 이상을 점유하고 있는 글로벌 보안 선도 기업으로, 엔드포인트 보안(EPP)과 탐지·대응(EDR) 부문에서 독보
articles.summary: 비트디펜더는 AI 기반 보안 플랫폼 'GravityZone'을 공개한다.
points: - AI 기반 XDR·EDR 통합 보안 플랫포인트·클라우드·네트워크 위협 탐지 및 대응
- 공개엔드포인트, 검색와 대응, 보안 전문가 시스템의 최적화
- 비롯하면 세계에서의 일치성을 위해 모듈화, 다양한 운영 상태를 수정하여 개발한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 AI 기반 보안 플랫폼은 우리나라와 광벳에서의 이를 일컍하거나, 국내 인식취약과 비전적으로 'GravityZone'을 활용하는게 매우유리하다.

articles.title: Indian tech tycoon bets $30M of his own money to build AI alternative to Microsoft Office
articles.description: Neo is Bhavin Turakhia’s fifth venture and his latest involving enterprise software. This time he's taking on Microsoft Office, Google Apps with AI.
articles.summary: Indian entrepreneur Bhavin Turakhia has invested $30 million to create an enterprise software alternative leveraging artificial intelligence for tasks typically performed by Microsoft Office.
points: Bhavin Turakhia, founder of neo4j and a five-time venture investor in India, is making headlines with his latest startup betting $30 million on an enterprise software solution that competes directly against popular platforms like Microsoft Office.

The project seeks to integrate AI into the office suite experience providing automated document creation for tasks such as drafting memos and minutes of a meeting, aiming at efficiency gains across various business processes including HR operations by streamlining activities from employee onboarding through recruitment, interview scheduling.

With neo's vision to reinvent how software is used in everyday office tasks with the help of AI and machine learning algorithms while ensuring a seamless integration for existing Microsoft Office users.
articles.insight: Bhavin Turakhia'threatensMicrosoft by creating an enterprise-level alternative using artificial intelligence, which could shift how businesses manage routine tasks more efficiently. If successful, it might prompt other tech giants to innovate in AI integration for productivity software.

articles.title: G-PASS 기업 94개사 지정... 글로벌 공공조달시장 진출 본격 지원
articles.description: 조달청, 2026년 2분기 G-PASS 기업 지정해외 마케팅·바이어 매칭 등 글로벌 조달시장 진출 지원하반기 UN 시장개척단·국제기구 조달시장 지원사업 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 조달청(청장 백승보)은 1일 서울지방조달청에서 ‘2026년 2분기 해외조달시장 진출 유망기업(이하 G-PASS) 지정서 수여식’을 개최했다.G-PASS 지정은 품질과 기술력을 갖
articles.summary: G-PASS 기업이 한국 글로벌 조달시장에서 진출 지원을 받았음
points: - 2026년 2분기에 해외 마케푸드·바이어로 조달시장에서의 진출을 위한 지정
- 현재 G-PASS 지정사거래가 10%를 차지하고 있다.
- 이로써 이국민들의 마케팅이 해외 조달시장에서의 발전을 촉진
articles.insight: 이러한 기업과 글로벌 조달시장에서의 활동은 현재 인도마케후 전문가들로부터 강조되어 정신적인 창립되었다.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관 51] 세 살 버릇 여든까지 간다(1)-무료 Wi-Fi에서 금융거래하면 생기는 일

articles.title: Apple is reportedly planning new iPad Pro and MacBook Pro releases early next year
articles.description: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest.
articles.summary: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest
points: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Bending Spoons defies SaaS slump, surges 40% on first day of trading
articles.description: The company has grown rapidly by acquiring and revamping last-generation tech brands like AOL, Eventbrite, Evernote, Meetup, and Vimeo.
articles.summary: Bending Spoon experienced a significant increase in its stock value after debuting on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), rising by about 40% following positive reactions to reports of rapid growth and strategic acquisitions.
points: Bending Spoon's first-day trading saw a surge, with stock jumping approximately 40%.
The company has expanded its portfolio by acquiring last-generinflation brands such as AOL and Vimeo. Experts believe this strategy helped drive the initial public interest in Bending Spoon's IPO.
Investors appear to be optimistic about growth opportunities with plans like revamping acquired tech companies.
articles.insight: Bending Spoon has demonstrated a potential pathway for SaaS startups looking to expand through strategic acquisitions and portfolio diversification, indicating that there may still be significant investment interest in the sector despite broader market concerns.

articles.title: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck
articles.description: The co-founders of Bending Spoons, the Italian company quietly buying beloved, ailing Internet brands, learned big lessons from their own startup's failure.
articles.summary: Bending Spoons co-founders reflect on success as minimizing luck after an $18B IPO flop and founding a company to buy struggling online brands.
points: Co-founders discuss the role of minimal reliance on luck in their startup'selfs, amidst failure post $18.4 billion failed Internet brand acquisition attempt leading them into establishing Bending Spoons - an Italian company aimed at purchasing struggling online brands.

Despite a significant investment and the backing of Silicon Valley firms like Sequoia, their startup's unsuccessful bid to purchase Quattro Warehouse backfired financially with losses totaling $23 million. Co-founders acknowledge misjudgment in predicting success for acquired brands.
Bending Spoons has since become a proactive entity offering assistance and mentorship, demonstrating an understanding of the tech industry's dynamics.
articles.insight: The experience highlighted by Bending Spoons co-founders underscores that success in acquiring online brands is not solely dependent on luck or initial capital investment. It emphasizes due diligence and an understanding of the market to make informed decisions, potentially providing a learning curve for future tech industry endeavors.

articles.title: WhatsApp usernames are already raising impersonation red flags
articles.description: Meta says usernames improve privacy, but critics question whether its safeguards can prevent impersonation.
articles.summary: Critics raise concerns about the potential for WhatsApp username impersonation despite Meta's claim that usernames enhance privacy.
points: WhatsApp introduced optional use of alphanumeric-only, customizable usernames to improve users’ anonymity and protect their personal information on the platform.

Critics argue this measure could lead to identity impersonation as some individuals might attempt to adopt someone else' endorsed by friends or family members with a shared name for malicious purposes.
Meta defends usernames, stating they give users more control over their online presence and can help protect against 'doxing,' where personal information is published without consent.
articles.insight: The introduction of WhatsApp user names brings forth the debate on privacy versus potential misuse risks within digital communication platforms, emphasizing the need for robust safeguards to prevent impersonation and protect users' identities while also providing control over online presence management.

articles.title: Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that’s been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims
articles.description: Research appears to reveal a bug that could render the feature effectively useless.
articles.summary: A security flaw in Apple's Hide My Email feature may be exposing users' real email addresses.
points: Researchers claim to have found a bug potentially making the new privacy tool, 'Hide My Email,' less effective
The issue could expose genuine user information if exploited by malicious entities or flawed implementation of alternative services
Apple has not confirmed this vulnerability and is reportedly investigating
articles.insight: This potential bug in 'Hide My Email' raises concerns about the reliability of privacy features provided as part of cloud-based storage solutions, possibly impacting user trust.

articles.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
articles.description: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.
articles.summary: SpaceX has unveiled an Artificial Intelligence prototype that resembles a handset and may indicate the company's intention to delve further into the wireless sector.
points: Artificial intelligence device with phone-like design
Reported as investor showcase for SpaceX
Potential signal of expansion in wireless technology
articles.insight: This development suggests that SpaceX may be seeking to diversify its business model and enter new markets by leveraging AI within the communications sector.

articles.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
articles.description: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.
articles.summary: Ashton Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures to found a new venture capital firm with Morgan Beller focused on investing in companies providing AI infrastructure and energy solutions.
points: Kutcher's new fund concentrates on the backbone of category-leading AI labs: their underlying infrastructure and power needs.
This shift represents a strategic move to tap into an often overlooked aspect in technology advancements—energy efficiency and sustainability within tech ecosystems.
Morgan Beller, known for her investment expertise with Sound Ventures' backing, joins Kutcher as co-founder of the new venture capital firm.
articles.insight: As AI becomes increasingly essential in various sectors, energy efficiency and sustainability within these technology ecosystems present a vital investment opportunity that Ashton Kutcher's latest fund is poised to explore. This move could signal an industry shift towards prioritizing green tech alongside innovation.

articles.title: Neocloud Together AI raises $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation
articles.description: The AI neocloud provider, which specializes in hosting open source models, last raised at a $3.3 billion valuation in early 2025.
articles.summary: Neocloud Together AI has secured an $800 million funding round that catapulted its company value to over $8 billion.
points: Neocloud Together, focused on hosting open-source models for enterprises and developers, raised a significant amount of capital recently
The recent investment has significantly increased Neocloud'th valuation from its last round in early 2025.
With this funding boost, Neocloud Together is poised to expand services into new markets and enhance infrastructure.
articles.insight: The investment shows strong market confidence in AI-driven cloud providers and indicates an increasing demand for specialized hosting solutions within the IT industry. The expansion potential of Neocloud Together may influence competitors to innovate or diversify their offerings.

articles.title: Lime begins life as a public company after years of uncertainty
articles.description: The nine-year-old scooter and bike-share company has said it needs the funds to help pay down around $1 billion in liabilities.

articles.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
articles.description: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.
articles.summary: Cloudflare has set a deadline of September 15 for AI companies to segregate their web crawlers from search engines and training agents or face blocking on numerous publisher sites.
points: AI firms must identify different types of automated internet activities by the specified date.
Cloudflare's action targets excessive scrape requests that strain website resources.
The policy shift emphasizes respect for content creators and publishers.
articles.insight: This development indicates a significant change in how AI companies must approach web data collection, potentially leading to more sustainable internet practices within the industry.

articles.title: Even Honda is pivoting to data centers
articles.description: Honda wants in on the lucrative energy storage market. This week it began producing batteries destined for data centers, not driveways.
articles.summary: Automaker Honda is venturing into manufacturing lithium-ion battery packs aimed at powering energy storage systems in data centers as part of its pivot to the lucrative market.
points: Honda, traditionally an automobile company, starts producing batteries for use in energy storage within data centers rather than electric vehicles (EV).
The shift represents Honda's strategic move into a growing sector and is expected to contribute significantly due to the rising demand from companies needing reliable power sources.
Honda plans to expand its manufacturing capacity for these batteries, with an aim of supplying 100 megawatt-hours (MWh) per year by fiscal 2030.
articles.insight: This diversification into energy storage could potentially position Honda as a significant player in both automotive and IT industries, capitalizing on the increasing demand for reliable power solutions amidst rising renewable energy integration challenges faced by data centers worldwide.

articles.title: Autonomous vehicle hype is back, and Humble Robotics is bringing it to freight
articles.description: The autonomous vehicle space is starting to feel like a repeat of the 2016 hype cycle. Travis Kalanick is back building a robotics company, and the talent wars and capital are heating up the same way they did the first time around. The money’s flowing back, and it’s the people who lived through that first […]
articles.summary: The autonomous vehicle industry is experiencing a resurgence of interest with Humble Robotics entering freight delivery via self-driving vehicles amidst renewed capital inflows and talent competition reminiscent of the previous boom. The sector's growth could lead to new advancements but also raises concerns about market saturation.
points: - Humble Robotics is deploying autonomous delivery vehicles for freight, indicating a return to interest and investment in AV technology beyond consumer applications.
- The industry's hype cycle appears similar to that of previous cycles with rising talent wars and capital flow reflective of 2016 dynamics.
- Skepticism remains regarding the maturity and stability of autonomous vehicle technologies, despite Humble Robotics’ ambitions.
articles.insight: The return to investment in AV technology suggests potential for growth but also indicates caution is warranted given past market volatility. The freight application sector might be an indicator of how mature the autonomous delivery space can become before full consumer adoption becomes feasible.

articles.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
articles.description: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.
articles.summary: Google has released its AI-based assistive tool 'Gemini Spark' on Mac computers along with enhancements such as real-time updates and broader app support.
points: AI assistant Gemini Spark is now available for the Apple ecosystem, notably macOS users.
This release includes improvements like live tracking of user progress or notifications.
Gemini Spark supports more apps than its predecessor and has real-time features.
articles.insight: The expansion of Google's AI assistant 'Gemini Spark' into the Mac ecosystem represents a strategic move to extend their user base beyond Android devices, potentially leading to an increase in market penetration within the personal computing sphere and offering users seamless integration between their multiple tech platforms.

articles.title: Sony to end physical PlayStation game disc sales in 2028
articles.description: Sony will stop producing physical discs for all new PlayStation games beginning in 2028, as the company embraces an all-digital future.
articles.summary: Beginning in 2028, Sony plans to cease producing physical discs for new PlayStation games and transition entirely to digital releases.
points: Sony will end production of all-new physical game discs by 2028 as the company transitions fully into a digitally focused future with its gaming consoles.
articles.insight: This decision from Sony not only marks an evolution in consumer preferences for digital content but also influences industry trends and forces competitors to accelerate their transition towards all-digital platforms. It could potentially drive a more unified, global strategy among console manufacturers and game developers alike.

articles.title: Builders Stage agenda revealed: Practical strategies for scaling startups at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: The Builders Stage is returning to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, bringing together 10,000+ founders, startup operators, and investors for practical conversations. and Q&A on what it takes to build and scale successful companies. Register now to save up to $330.
articles.summary: The Builders Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 will convene thousands of founders and industry professionals for a day focused on scaling startups effectively.
points: - The event promises practical advice with experts sharing strategies to grow successful companies.
- Attendees can benefit from roundtables, panels, interviews, fireside chats, hackathons and workshops in the TechCrunch HQ. Plus
- Early bird registration offers significant savings on tickets.
articles.insight: This event could become an essential platform for startups to gain crucial insights into scaling their businesses effectively, thus potentially impacting numerous tech companies' success rates in the industry.

articles.title: Meta, like SpaceX, looks to turn excess AI compute into cash
articles.description: Meta is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business, selling access to AI compute power and models. The move would pit it against the big cloud providers like Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

articles.title: 글로벌 양자기술 한자리... ‘퀀텀코리아 2026’ 2일 개막
articles.description: 12개국 56개 기업 참가... 컴퓨팅·통신·센싱 기술 공개[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 글로벌 양자기술이 한자리에 모인다. 과학기술정보통신부(부총리 겸 장관 배경훈)는 2~4일 서울 동대문구 동대문디자인플라자(DDP) 아트홀에서 양자 과학기술 연구산업 축제인 ‘퀀텀 코리아 2026’을 개최한다고 1일 밝혔다.퀀텀코리아는 연구자 교류와 학술 성과를 소개하던 양자
articles.summary: 글로벌 양자기술연구에서 피리쉬어에 의해 여러 국가와 기업이 참가하는 '퀀텀 코리아 2026'을 개최한다.
points: 12개국과 56개기술회사가 서울에서 연구산업 축제를 개체화하며, 피리쉬어에서 이들이 양자 공개시스틸을 다세계에 가지고 나오는 의미를 전반적으로 인식한다.
이를 바탕으로 연구와 기술회사들은 양자 기술에 대해 더 자세히 알아보고, 기술의 이론적 발전을 측정하고 시스틸제를 위한 전문가들의 연구와 소통에서 발전해야 함을 강조한다.
이러한 축제는 여러 국가와 기업이 공유하고자 하는 양자 연구에 대한 오리지모성을 풍부히 강조해주고 있다.
articles.insight: 글로벌 양자기술의 공개에 가속하는 대상들은 이를 위한 인물성과 분야적 지식을 갖고 오히묵으로운 연구와 기술회사들의 중요성을 강조하고싶어 한국어로 '퀀텀 코리아 2026'이 서울에서 개체화되는 현상을 요약한다.

articles.title: 차세대 보안 리더 110명, AI 방어전 최전선 선다... BoB 15기 발대식
articles.description: 차세대 보안리더 양성 프로그램, BoB 15기 공식 출범3단계 멘토링 프로젝트 통해 글로벌 수준 보안 역량 배양[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 대한민국 정보보호를 이끌어갈 차세대 정예 화이트해커들이 AI 시대를 정조준하며 새로운 출발선에 섰다.차세대 보안리더 양성 프로그램(BoB) 15기 발대식이 1일 서울 강남구 섬유센터에서 성황리에 개최됐다. 과학기술정보통신부
articles.summary: 110명의 IT/기술 공학자가 AI를 활용해 BoB 15년간 국내에서 최고의 추방운전 시스템을 개발하여 국민보호를 위해 팀으로 합병한다.
points: 차세대 보안 리덤맨이 AI 방어전을 이용한 최종적으로 개발한 BoB 15년간 국내에서 우회운전에 대한 최상의 시스템.
110명이 합병한 팀이 AI를 사용하여 국민보호를 위해 창모리하여, 금리 점점 낮아지고 있다.
과연의 기대가 최상의 이미지인지만, AI로 높은 검출도 필요해보인다.
articles.insight: 심장이 오공을 촉구하는 110명의 IT/기술 공학자들이 AI를 사용한 최고의 추방시스템인 BoB 15년간 발생. 이로써 국민보호를 위해 강력하게 개발하였다.

articles.title: 사후약방문 넘어 AI 보안 본 궤도? 이통사 보안 투자 3600억 돌파
